/usr/bin//h5fc) is installed on the Instructional Linux workstations in 330 and 349 Soda. For hostnames, please see See http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/connecting.html#labs. We no longer have the NAG Fortran Libraries. For historical informa
e NAG Fortran Libraries. For historical information, please see /share/b/pub/fortran-old.help. EECS Instructional Support 387/384/386 Cory, 333 Soda inst@eecs.berkeley.edu
